title: Tenured Change Adoption Playbook
description: Adopt new process with longtime staff who know the old way and resist change. Structured reflection and report, not cold mandate.

mindset.principle: Tenured resistance is often identity, not laziness. Force engagement, not silence.

mistakes.label: Announce new process with no adoption path
mistakes.cost: Underground old way continues; public compliance, private sabotage

mistakes.label: Frame veterans as obstacles in team meetings
mistakes.cost: Alliance against you; they have the tribal knowledge you need

mistakes.label: Verbal agreement only
mistakes.cost: No proof of engagement when complaint escalates

mistakes.label: Same day flip with no ramp

scope.focus: Ops lead, supervisor, or agent supporting process change with longtime clerical or counter staff
not_for: safety violations that need immediate stop-work

resistance_signals: We always did it this way
Complaints about every new step but no proposed alternative
Deep process knowledge paired with refusal to try new workflow
Peer deference: others wait to see if veteran accepts change
Works the old workaround after official rollout
not_this_pattern: New hire confusion without tenure identity

adoption_program.name: Structured change engagement

steps.label: Assign short change-read + written report
steps.detail: Paid work time. Short book or brief on adapting to change. Written report required.

steps.label: Present to lead or team
steps.detail: Their choice: 1:1 with supervisor or brief team share. 10-15 minutes max.

steps.label: Fixed deadline
steps.detail: One to two weeks typical for read + report. Date on calendar.

steps.label: File outcome
steps.detail: Report saved. Attendance noted. Refusal path documented if needed.

adoption_program.why_it_works: Veterans must articulate the change in their own words. Resistance becomes visible and workable instead of ambient complaining.

decision_branches.situation: Rollout meeting met with veteran pushback
Agrees after 1:1 on why engagement is required
Complies on paper, old way persists
Will not engage after documented chat

steps.name: Name the change
steps.goal: One page: old way, new way, start date, why

steps.name: Collect reports
steps.goal: File and skim for blockers you can fix

steps.name: Ramp
steps.goal: Veteran as peer trainer if report shows buy-in

agent_signal.use_when: Longtime staff resist new process or system. Know old way cold. Complain without engaging.
decision_criteria: Do not shame veterans in group settings.
Reflection report plus presentation before bad faith assumption.
agent_signal.operator_context: Registration and counter desks: veterans hold process memory. Engage before escalate.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Longtime staff resist new process or system. Know old way cold. Complain without engaging.
Need playbook: Tenured Change Adoption Playbook
